policies.enrollmentScheduleControl: The signed Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule controls the selected tier, term, monthly rate, exact included services, add-ons, and any separately billed third-party items.
policies.autoRenewal: After the initial term, membership converts to month-to-month unless either party gives at least 30 days' written notice of non-renewal.
policies.noticePeriod: 30 days' written notice before the end of the initial term or month-to-month termination date.
policies.pauseRights: Only if expressly permitted in the signed Membership Agreement or an approved written addendum; the signed agreement controls duration, billing effect, and term-extension effect.
policies.earlyTermination: If the member terminates early other than an approved or legally required cancellation, the remaining discounted contract value through the end date remains due as stated in the signed Membership Agreement.
policies.thirdPartyDisclosure: Independent physician, laboratory, imaging, pharmacy, and other third-party clinical charges are excluded unless the signed Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule expressly lists them as included.

ESSENTIALS.tagline: Foundational accountability with a written service schedule
ESSENTIALS.publicDescription: A foundational wellness membership with four monthly training sessions and written enrollment terms that specify any clinical or third-party inclusions.

CORE.tagline: Higher session volume with priority coordination
CORE.publicDescription: A higher-frequency membership with eight monthly training sessions and priority care coordination, with any clinical inclusions defined in the signed enrollment schedule.

CONCIERGE.tagline: Highest-touch support with the most training capacity
CONCIERGE.publicDescription: Our highest-touch membership with sixteen monthly training sessions and the most hands-on care coordination, with any third-party inclusions stated in writing at enrollment.

values.ESSENTIALS: Baseline + periodic reassessment per Service Schedule
values.CORE: Baseline + expanded reassessment cadence per Service Schedule
values.CONCIERGE: Baseline + highest reassessment cadence per Service Schedule

separatelyBilledThirdPartyItems: Independent physician services unless expressly listed as included on the Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule
Laboratory panels and specimen collection unless expressly listed as included on the Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule
Imaging services, including DXA or other scans, unless expressly listed as included on the Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule
Supplements and retail products unless expressly listed as included on the Enrollment Summary and Service Schedule
